title: Mobile Crane Operator
description:
Attractive Salary & Benefits

Infiniti Marine Pte Ltd is a leading marine and port operations company providing safe, efficient, and compliant lifting and logistics support services. We are seeking a Mobile Crane Operator to support shore-to-vessel and vessel-to-shore operations, ensuring all lifting activities are performed in accordance with safety, regulatory, and operational standards. Candidates who are reliable, safety-conscious, and able to perform in a fast-paced marine environment are encouraged to apply.

Job Description

  • Operate mobile cranes for the handling of ship supplies and provisions between shore and vessel, and vice versa.
  • Carry out cargo handling operations efficiently and in full compliance with safety, security, and regulatory requirements.
  • Coordinate with vessel crew members, external contractors & team members to ensure safe and smooth operations.
  • Perform basic operational checks and promptly report any technical faults, safety hazards, or security infringements.

Job Requirements

  • Valid Mobile Crane Operator License (mandatory, pre-requisite).
  • Minimum 2 years of mobile crane operating experience preferred
  • Comfortable working in an IT-enabled environment (e.g. mobile devices, tablets).
  • Willing to perform shift work
  • A reliable team player with good coordination skills.
  • Able to adapt and perform effectively in a fast-paced operational environment.

postedCompany.description:
Welcome to Infiniti Marine Pte Ltd


We are a tug and barge operator specializing in Singapore-Batam liner services, project cargo, and vessel chartering. Since our establishment in 2006, initially focused on the Singapore-Batam route, we have strategically expanded our capabilities to become a comprehensive transportation solution provider for heavy lift cargo across Singapore, Malaysia, and Indonesia, utilizing our own fleet of tugs and barges. In addition, we now offer tug and barge chartering services throughout the broader home trade region, further enhancing our operational scope.


Our list of services includes;

 Singapore - Batam Liner
Singapore - Tanjung Pelapas Liner
Tanjung Pelapas - Batam Liner
Singapore - Pasir Gudang
Singapore - Pasir Gudang - Port Klang
Project Cargo
Tug & Barge Chartering
Miscellaneous Services


FLEET

We owned and operate a young fleet of vessels. All our vessels are IACS classed and meet some of the most stringent requirements and survey standards. Our vessels follow a strict maintenance program as we have zero tolerance policy for vessel breakdowns.

Our area of operation includes Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Thailand, Brunei, Vietnam and Myanmar.


Over the years, we have successfully completed a wide range of projects. This page will showcase our expertise and experience in handling various types of cargoes.
postedCompany.name: INFINITI MARINE PTE. LTD.
